entity.summary: Early altcoin-focused centralized exchange using coinedup.com, with public use visible in early 2014 and later exchange-data listings marking it inactive or untracked.
entity.notes: HEI keeps the record inactive because available references do not establish a definitive terminal date. Origin remains Unknown. A first-party operator forum post identifies the exchange project, while later database references describe it as inactive or untracked.

expected.notes: HEI does not force a dead classification because the current evidence set has inactive / untracked database references and community discussion of apparent wind-down, but no strong official shutdown notice or definitive terminal date. Status is therefore modeled as inactive rather than dead.

changes.notes: HEI keeps the record inactive because available references do not establish a definitive terminal date. Origin remains Unknown. A first-party operator forum post identifies the exchange project, while later database references describe it as inactive or untracked.

evidence.title: Hello from CoinedUp.com
evidence.notes: A self-identified CoinedUp lead developer introduced CoinedUp.com as a new crypto-only exchange, providing first-party identity evidence without changing HEI's conservative launch marker.
